description: 实现 docs/prd/features 下 F01-F08 的核心能力：账本、持仓、导入、估值看板、提醒、报表、对账与系统配置，满足统一口径、可观测与可交付验收。

userStories.title: 建立核心数据模型与迁移脚本（ledger/position/txn/import/report/reconcile/config）
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a consistent schema and migration set so that all feature modules share one reliable data foundation.
acceptanceCriteria: Create/upgrade tables for ledgers, positions, position_txn, import_batches, report_snapshot, reconcile_result, notify_rules, and config records
Enforce key constraints (ledger name unique per user, soft-delete flags, status enums, audit timestamps)
Provide rollback-safe migration scripts and seed data for local/dev

userStories.title: 统一收益口径计算库（单一来源）
userStories.description: As a product/ops stakeholder, I want one calculation library for total asset, daily estimated pnl, final pnl, and cumulative pnl so that dashboard/report/notify numbers stay consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement shared formulas and precision rules (shares 4 decimals, amount in cents int64)
Expose reusable service methods for dashboard, reports, and reconcile jobs

userStories.title: 账本创建与列表汇总接口（F01）
userStories.description: As a multi-account user, I want to create ledgers and view per-ledger summary so that my funds are isolated and manageable.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement POST /api/v1/ledgers with name validation (2-20 chars, unique per user)
Implement GET /api/v1/ledgers with summary fields: totalAssetCents, todayPnlCents, totalPnlCents, positionCount
Return correct business errors for duplicate/invalid inputs

userStories.title: 账本上下文切换与“全部账本”聚合（F01）
userStories.description: As a daily user, I want ledger context switching and all-ledger aggregate so that I can view isolated or global data correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Support ledger scope switch affecting downstream queries
Support all-ledger aggregation with consistent calculation logic
Handle empty ledgers with zero-value summaries without errors

userStories.title: 持仓创建与基础校验（F02）
userStories.description: As a portfolio maintainer, I want strict create validation for fund code, shares, and cost so that dirty data is blocked early.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement POST /api/v1/positions with fund-exists and numeric validation
Return FND-1001 for unknown fund and FND-1002 for invalid params
Persist initial position with correct default status and invested amount

userStories.title: 持仓增减仓、清仓状态与交易记录（F02）
userStories.description: As a high-frequency trader, I want increase/decrease/edit operations with transaction history so that position cost and status stay auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement PATCH /api/v1/positions/{id} for increase/decrease/edit with weighted cost formula
Reject over-decrease with FND-1003 and support idempotency key for write operations
Auto-switch status to cleared when shares reach zero and write each operation to position_txn

userStories.title: 持仓查询与软删除（F02）
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want readable position lists and soft delete semantics so that history remains traceable.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement GET /api/v1/positions and DELETE /api/v1/positions/{id} as soft delete
Deleted records are excluded from default list but preserved for history/audit
Provide last-success snapshot fallback metadata for read failure scenarios

userStories.title: CSV 导入校验与部分成功提交（F03）
userStories.description: As a new user, I want CSV import with row-level feedback and partial success so that bulk onboarding is efficient and safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement /api/v1/imports/csv/validate returning row errors and summary
Implement /api/v1/imports/csv/commit to persist only validated rows and keep failed rows isolated
Store batchId and deduplicate repeated commit by validation checksum/idempotency

userStories.title: OCR 草稿识别与强制确认提交流程（F03）
userStories.description: As an OCR user, I want low-confidence fields to require manual confirmation so that no untrusted draft enters production data.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement /api/v1/imports/ocr/draft with confidence annotations and uncertain-field marks
Persist confirmed imports into position and position_txn with batch trace

userStories.title: 行情拉取与缓存降级服务（F04/F08）
userStories.description: As a platform service, I want robust quote fetching with retry, timeout fallback, and source health checks so that dashboard data remains available.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement quote service for realtime/nav/basic with retry (max 2) and timeout fallback to cache
Map and expose data-source errors: token invalid, quota insufficient, api rate limited

userStories.title: 首页总览与持仓排序筛选接口（F04）
userStories.description: As a high-frequency viewer, I want one-screen overview and sortable positions so that I can quickly understand current performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement GET /api/v1/dashboard/overview and GET /api/v1/positions sorting/filtering integration
Support ledger scope and all-ledger scope with unified metrics
Return delay markers and last refresh time for stale/degraded quote scenarios

userStories.title: 提醒规则与净值触达任务（F05）
userStories.description: As a risk-sensitive user, I want threshold alerts with do-not-disturb and dedup rules so that I receive useful updates without spam.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement PUT /api/v1/notify/rules and nav daily-summary access
Implement trigger pipeline after nav finalization with daily dedup (same category max once/day)
Respect do-not-disturb windows (external push suppressed, in-app fallback kept)

userStories.title: 提醒重试、保底通道与点击追踪（F05）
userStories.description: As an ops owner, I want reliable delivery with retries/fallback and click tracking so that notification SLA is measurable.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement retry policy (3 exponential retries) for external push failures
Fallback to in-app message when external delivery fails
Emit notify trigger/click metrics and latency measurement

userStories.title: 周报/月报快照生成与读取（F06）
userStories.description: As a review user, I want immutable weekly/monthly report snapshots so that longitudinal analysis is stable and comparable.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement weekly/monthly snapshot generation jobs with versioning
Implement read APIs for report snapshots by period and ledger
Ensure snapshots are immutable and re-calc keeps version history

userStories.title: 报表分享导出与异常回退（F06）
userStories.description: As a report user, I want report sharing output and resilient fallback to latest snapshot so that reports are always accessible.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement report share export output (long image or equivalent artifact)
On read/generate failure, return latest available snapshot with timestamp/degraded marker
Keep period and ledger comparability fields consistent

userStories.title: 日对账任务、误差阈值与告警（F07）
userStories.description: As a quality owner, I want daily reconcile automation with threshold checks and fast alerts so that metric trust is protected.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement daily reconcile run using shared calculation library and fixed sample sets
Mark pass/warn/fail by <=0.1% error threshold and missing-data conditions
Trigger alerts within 5 minutes for fail/warn policy breaches

userStories.title: 按日期重算机制与版本留痕（F07）
userStories.description: As an operator, I want date-based recalculation with retained versions so that reconciliation issues can be corrected without losing history.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement recalculate jobs by date range with non-destructive versioned results
Link reconcile records to source dataset/version and execution logs
Expose latest passed version for runtime fallback

userStories.title: 系统配置中心与环境切换（F08）
userStories.description: As an admin, I want test/prod data-source config switching and rollback controls so that operations are safe and controlled.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement config validation and environment switch (test/prod) with health checks
Ensure token is loaded from environment/secret manager only, never committed to repo or persisted as plaintext
Support rollback flow for invalid config/performance regression

userStories.title: 可观测性与告警基线（F01-F08）
userStories.description: As an ops engineer, I want unified metrics/logging/tracing across core flows so that reliability targets can be monitored and incidents can be diagnosed quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Attach requestId traceability for key errors and include structured logs
Define and wire alert thresholds for success rates, latency P95, and failure spikes

userStories.title: 账本与持仓管理前端页面（F01/F02）
userStories.description: As an end user, I want usable ledger/position UI flows so that I can create ledgers, switch scope, and perform position operations with clear feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement ledger page (create modal, list summary, switcher including all-ledger)
Implement position list and increase/decrease/delete interactions with field-level validation messages

userStories.title: 导入与OCR确认前端页面（F03）
userStories.description: As a user onboarding positions, I want csv upload feedback and ocr confirmation UI so that I can import quickly with confidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement CSV upload/validate/commit flow with row-level error rendering
Implement OCR draft review page with mandatory confirmation of low-confidence fields

userStories.title: 首页总览与延迟提示前端（F04）
userStories.description: As a daily active user, I want fast dashboard rendering with freshness indicators so that I can trust what I see during trading and off-hours.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement overview cards, position sorting/filtering, and ledger scope switch
Show stale/degraded status with last update timestamp and fallback messaging

userStories.title: 提醒规则与当日总结入口前端（F05）
userStories.description: As a notification user, I want to configure threshold and do-not-disturb and navigate to daily summary from reminders.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement notification settings UI (thresholds, schedule, do-not-disturb)
Support reminder deep-link entry to daily summary view

userStories.title: 周报/月报与分享前端（F06）
userStories.description: As a review user, I want weekly/monthly report views with ledger comparison and share action so that I can analyze and communicate performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement report pages for weekly/monthly snapshots and ledger switch comparison
Implement share action and degraded fallback rendering

userStories.title: 系统设置与健康检查前端（F08）
userStories.description: As an admin/operator, I want a settings panel for datasource mode and health status so that environment and risk posture are visible and controllable.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement settings page for env mode, timezone, notify and datasource health visibility
Prevent plaintext token display/storage in UI and logs
